ddls:
CREATE TABLE "namespaces" (
  "namespace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each namespace */,
  "namespace_uri" TEXT /* Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) of the namespace */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization that registered the namespace */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contact person for the namespace */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date when the namespace was registered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the namespace */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the namespace */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the namespace (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "assurance_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assurance level of the namespace */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the namespace is set to expire */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the namespace's renewal process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("namespace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_namespaces_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_namespaces_assurance_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("assurance_level_id") REFERENCES assurance_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_namespaces_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "org_type" TEXT /* Type of the organization (e.g., academic, research, government) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the organization was created in the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the organization's information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the organization (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the organization's website */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact person */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the contact person */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization the contact person belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the contact person was created in the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the contact person's information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contact person (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the contact person */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the contact person */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the contact person within the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assurance_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assurance level */,
  "level_type" TEXT /* Type of assurance level (e.g., identity, authentication) */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the assurance level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assurance level */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the assurance level was created in the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the assurance level's information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assurance level (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "compliance_requirements" TEXT /* Detailed requirements for the assurance level to ensure compliance */,
  "audit_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of audits required for the assurance level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "namespace_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each namespace version */,
  "namespace_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the namespace */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the namespace */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_namespace_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_namespace_versions_namespace_id FOREIGN KEY ("namespace_id") REFERENCES namespaces ("namespace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "namespace_id" INTEGER /* ID of the namespace involved in the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_namespace_id FOREIGN KEY ("namespace_id") REFERENCES namespaces ("namespace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, auditor, representative) */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created in the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the user's information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "mfa_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether multi-factor authentication is enabled for the user */,
  "mfa_method" TEXT /* Method of multi-factor authentication used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created in the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the role's information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "namespace_id" INTEGER /* ID of the namespace related to the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., renewal, compliance review) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_details" TEXT /* Details of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, dismissed) */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who sent the notification */,
  "sent_method" TEXT /* Method by which the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_namespace_id FOREIGN KEY ("namespace_id") REFERENCES namespaces ("namespace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance review */,
  "namespace_id" INTEGER /* ID of the namespace being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the review */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "review_details" TEXT /* Details of the review */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments from the reviewer */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date when the next compliance review is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reviews_namespace_id FOREIGN KEY ("namespace_id") REFERENCES namespaces ("namespace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
